description: Product Description 50 ELECTRONIC REFILLABLE LIGHTERS WITH ADJUSTABLE FLAME Multicolour Electronic Child Safe Lighters - This electronic lighter is designed for superior performance in extreme conditions. Electronic Refillable Lighters with Adjustable Flame. Child Safety. Attractive Multicolour Lighters. Electronic refillable lighters with adjustable flame. These electronic lighters are suitable to light cigarettes, pipes, and cigars, perfect as BBQ lighters, torch lighters, fire starters, and stove lighters. Child Safety. The lightweight of this cigar lighter makes it easy to handle and carry in a pocket. Attractive Multicolour Lighters. Whether you’re lighting a birthday candle or staying prepped for an emergency, pocket lighters will never leave you caught without a light. High Quality. The ergonomic transparent body design is perfect for comfort and maximum grip. FEATURES: High Quality Steady Flame Child Safety Multipurpose Transparent Body Attractive Multicolour Lighters Electronic Lighters with Adjustable Flame
